Fields.Name: Neck Turn Gain
Fields.Description: Swing gain. The higher it is, the faster it spins.

Fields.Name: Minimum Ankle Height
Fields.Description: Minimum Height at which Ankle is raised

Fields.Name: Maximum Ankle Height
Fields.Description: Maximum Height at which Ankle is raised

Fields.Name: Maximum Bend Angle
Fields.Description: Maximum angle at which the knee can be bent (cosine value)

Fields.Name: Minimum Bend Angle
Fields.Description: Minimum angle at which the knee can be bent (cosine value)

Fields.Name: Lowest Ankle Height
Fields.Description: The lowest position assuming that the ankles are attached

Fields.Name: Highest Ankle Height
Fields.Description: Highest position assuming ankles are apart

Fields.Name: Ankle Raycast Upward Distance
Fields.Description: How high above the ankle should you cast the ray?

Fields.Name: Ankle Raycast Downward Distance
Fields.Description: How far below the ankle should you ray cast?

Fields.Name: Foot Turning Gain
Fields.Description: Gain when turning foot contact on and off

Fields.Name: Foot Gain on Upward Ramp
Fields.Description: Gain when ground height increases

Fields.Name: Foot Gain on Downward Ramp
Fields.Description: Gain when ground height decreases

Fields.Name: Foot Gain when Raised
Fields.Description: Gain when the foot is raised

Fields.Name: Foot Gain when Planted
Fields.Description: Gain when foot touches the ground

Fields.Name: Foot Gain when Unlocked
Fields.Description: Gain when unlocked

Fields.Name: Knee Axis Type
Fields.Description: Axial direction of the knee

Fields.Name: Use Foot Locking
Fields.Description: Do you want to lock (fix?) your feet/ankles?

Fields.Name: Use Foot Placement
Fields.Description: Is foot contact effective?

Fields.Name: Twist Knee Axis Type
Fields.Description: Axial direction of knee joint for twisting

Fields.Name: Neck Turn Priority
Fields.Description: The lower it is, the faster it will turn. -1 does not shake the head

Fields.Name: Neck Turn Max Angle
Fields.Description: Maximum rotation angle for this joint. Can't bend beyond this angle
